---
title: "Keynote Speech: Safe routes to school: finding gaps in quiet networks to prioritise investment in active travel infrastructure"
date: 2022-11-03 15:00:00+01:00
author:
  - "Robin Lovelace"
---

## Keynote Speech: Safe routes to school: finding gaps in quiet networks to prioritise investment in active travel infrastructure

**Event:** Modeshift Convention 2022

**Date:** 2022-11-03 15:00:00+01:00
